popularStory.headline: Louis VI King of the Franks (France)
popularStory.description:
Louis VI (1 December 1081 – 1 August 1137), called the Fat (French: le Gros), was King of the Franks from 1108 until his death (1137). Chronicles called him "roi de Saint-Denis".

 
Louis VI …

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Louis VI (late 1081 – 1 August 1137), called the Fat[1] (French: le Gros) or the Fighter (French: le Batailleur), was King of the Franks from 1108 to 1137.[2]

Louis VI married in 1104: 1) Lucienne de Rochefort — the marriage was annulled on 23 May 1107 at the Council of Troyes by Pope Paschal II.[21]

He married in 1115: 2) Adélaide de Maurienne (1092–1154)[21]
Their children:
- Philip (29 August 1116 – 13 October 1131), King of the Franks (1129–31), not to be confused with his brother of the same name; he died as a result of a fall from a horse.
- Louis VII (1120 – 18 September 1180), King of the Franks
- Henry (1121 – 13 November 1175), Archbishop of Reims[22]
- Hugh (ca 1122 – died young).
- Robert (ca 1123 – 11 October 1188), count of Dreux[23]
- Peter[24] (September 1126 – 10 April 1183), married Elizabeth, Lady of Courtenay[25]
- Constance (ca 1128 – 16 August 1176), married first Eustace IV, count of Boulogne, and then Raymond V of Toulouse
- Philip (c.1132 -1160), Archdeacon of Paris[26]

With Marie de Breuillet, daughter of Renaud de Breuillet de Dourdan,[27] Louis VI was the father of a daughter:
- Isabelle (ca 1105 – before 1175), married (ca. 1119) Guillaume I of Chaumont in 1117[28]

zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs於1081年12月7日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲時，他的父親Philippe Ier roi des Francs29歲，母親Bertha van Holland27歲。他於1115年8月3日與Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France在法國阿希迪瑟 德 芭黎絲結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1123年被列為king of france。他去世於1137年8月1日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在法國利艾尼沙吉登尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs于1081年12月7日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲时，他的父亲Philippe Ier roi des Francs29岁，母亲Bertha van Holland27岁。他于1115年8月3日与Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France在法国阿希迪瑟 德 芭黎絲结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1123年被列为king of france。他去世于1137年8月1日在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在法国利艾尼沙吉登尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: 'le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Gros'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name, possibly derived from Norse gróa ‘to grow’, or possibly related to the Celtic element gruach ‘woman’.

en.lifeSummary: When Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs was born on 7 December 1081, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, his father, Philippe Ier roi des Francs, was 29 and his mother, Bertha van Holland, was 27. He married Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France on 3 August 1115, in Archdiocese of Paris, France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. In 1123, at the age of 41, his occupation is listed as king of france. He died on 1 August 1137, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Saint-Denis, Réunion, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs est né le 7 décembre 1081, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, son père, Philippe Ier roi des Francs, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Bertha van Holland, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France le 3 août 1115, à Archidiocèse de Paris, France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. En 1123, à l’âge de 41 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est king of france. Il est décédé le 1 août 1137, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Denis, Réunion, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs am 7. Dezember 1081 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philippe Ier roi des Francs 29 und seine Mutter Bertha van Holland 27. Er hat am 3. August 1115 in Archidiocèse de Paris, Frankreich Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1123, als er 41 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als king of france aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. August 1137 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Saint-Denis, Réunion, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs è nato il il 7 dicembre 1081 nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Philippe Ier roi des Francs, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Bertha van Holland, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France il 3 agosto 1115, nel Archidiocèse de Paris, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1123, all'età di 41 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come king of france. Morì il 1 agosto 1137, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Denis, Riunione, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francsが1081年12月7日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで生まれた時，父Philippe Ier roi des Francsは29歳，母Bertha van Hollandは27歳であった。1115年8月3日にフランスアーチディオクeゼ ド パーイスでAdelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de Franceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1123年，41歳の時，職業はking of franceと記録されている。彼は1137年8月1日に故郷で55歳で死去し，フランスレユニオンサイント-デニスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs(이)가 1081년 12월 7일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philippe Ier roi des Francs(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertha van Holland(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1115년 8월 3일 프랑스 아치디오ce스 데 파리스에서 Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1123년, 41세의 나이로 그의 직업은 king of france이었다. 그는 1137년 8월 1일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 e니언 세인트-데니스에 묻혔다.

mn.7 December 1081–1 August 1137: 1081 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 7–1137 оны Наймдугаар сарын 1

pt.7 December 1081–1 August 1137: 7 de dezembro de 1081–1 de agosto de 1137
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs nasceu em 7 de dezembro de 1081, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Philippe Ier roi des Francs, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Bertha van Holland, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France em 3 de agosto de 1115, em Archidiocèse de Paris, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1123, com 41 anos, sua profissão aparece como king of france. Ele faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1137, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Denis, Reunião, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs родился 7 декабря 1081 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Philippe Ier roi des Francs было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertha van Holland, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France 3 августа 1115 г. в местности арчидиокeс де пэрис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1123 году, в возрасте 41 год,  он работал по профессии king of france. Он умер 1 августа 1137 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-денис, Реюньон, Франция.

es.7 December 1081–1 August 1137: 7 de diciembre de 1081–1 de agosto de 1137
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis VI 'le Gros' roi des Francs nació el 7 de diciembre de 1081, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Philippe Ier roi des Francs, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Bertha van Holland, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Adelaide de Savoie de maurienne, Reine de France el 3 de agosto de 1115, en Archidiocèse de Paris, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. En 1123, a la edad de 41 años, su ocupación registrada era king of france. Murió el 1 de agosto de 1137, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Denis, Réunion, Francia.
